title: Add support for podman push, create, run --retry --retry-delay
body:
<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]". That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
If no, just write `None` in the release-note block below. If yes, a release note
is required: Enter your extended release note in the block below. If the PR
requires additional action from users switching to the new release, include the
string "action required".

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md
-->

```release-note
Podman  create, push, and run now supports --retry and --retry-delay
```

comments.body:
@rhatdan needs a rebase on this one.
Also, unless I scrolled by them, I didn't see any man page changes and I'd expect them given new options for push, or is it all API?
Some doc nits, other than that, LGTM once the tests are hip.  Currently, they are redder than red.
Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
Cockpit tests failed for commit 41ee6e1ed9d93dc3408d04c86de1a732ff44ffaa. @martinpitt, @jelly, @mvollmer please check.

Tests look adequate; I doubt it's worth the effort to repeat the `pull` test.

Please update the release-note (in comment 0) to reflect create & run.

LGTM if the flakes pass, but needs more review than just mine.
@ashley-cui @baude @n1hility We are blocking PRs based on containers/common not working with hyperV?
Rebase once https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/21572 lands and you should get green tests

@giuseppe PTAL, your latest c/storage changes break podman tests:
```
3f2e81abb38926d9b908528412c25fa2e199b6b9 is the first bad commit
commit 3f2e81abb38926d9b908528412c25fa2e199b6b9
Author: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>
Date:   Tue Feb 13 13:43:16 2024 +0100

    overlay: replace rmdir with rename
    
    instead of removing the "merged" directory, replace it with a fresh
    empty directory so that we can assume "merged" is always present and
    there is no need to recreate it.
    
    Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

 drivers/overlay/overlay.go | 26 +++++++++++++++++++++-----
 1 file changed, 21 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)
bisect found first bad commit
$ git bisect log
git bisect start
# status: waiting for both good and bad commits
# bad: [a083950a778fb14c70819d20a42472618f3cc5fe] Merge pull request #1843 from giuseppe/enhance-chunked-cache
git bisect bad a083950a778fb14c70819d20a42472618f3cc5fe
# status: waiting for good commit(s), bad commit known
# good: [387d7c8480b012455286c9804ef920493d9d5140] Merge pull request #1844 from mtrmac/chunked-cleanups
git bisect good 387d7c8480b012455286c9804ef920493d9d5140
# bad: [8a4fb72d2e4560d75ac6dbce4070764985119b29] Merge pull request #1828 from giuseppe/overlay-ignore-mkdir-fail-in-additional-store
git bisect bad 8a4fb72d2e4560d75ac6dbce4070764985119b29
# bad: [de38d80855503aac0c46de79b121588cb4d57966] overlay: do not recreate "merged" dir
git bisect bad de38d80855503aac0c46de79b121588cb4d57966
# bad: [3f2e81abb38926d9b908528412c25fa2e199b6b9] overlay: replace rmdir with rename
git bisect bad 3f2e81abb38926d9b908528412c25fa2e199b6b9
# first bad commit: [3f2e81abb38926d9b908528412c25fa2e199b6b9] overlay: replace rmdir with rename
```

Reproducer: `hack/bats --root 60:"podman mount external container - basic test"`

Upgrade tests are also failing, I haven't run bisect on it and just assume it is the same issue.
```
[+0040s] # [08:43:48.850457652] # podman start -a mydonecontainer
[+0040s] # [08:43:48.918513158] time="2024-02-28T08:43:48-06:00" level=error msg="Unmounting /tmp/pu.Y2o8Z7/root/overlay/df354de822f05c16ec885700f693680f3be79db84467695e40869780a1430cd6/merged: no such file or directory"
[+0040s] # Error: unable to start container 986d1a1d7a84ab5e50d37222b96e3711058d9753f311979e7b0d068437a9ad7f: mounting storage for container 986d1a1d7a84ab5e50d37222b96e3711058d9753f311979e7b0d068437a9ad7f: creating overlay mount to /tmp/pu.Y2o8Z7/root/overlay/df354de822f05c16ec885700f693680f3be79db84467695e40869780a1430cd6/merged, mount_data="lowerdir=/tmp/pu.Y2o8Z7/root/overlay/l/PQ2YAY2HGTEKKRY37OIHRNBFPG:/tmp/pu.Y2o8Z7/root/overlay/l/TWUPN5A2IZF4A7E42PS4DYBTG3,upperdir=/tmp/pu.Y2o8Z7/root/overlay/df354de822f05c16ec885700f693680f3be79db84467695e40869780a1430cd6/diff,workdir=/tmp/pu.Y2o8Z7/root/overlay/df354de822f05c16ec885700f693680f3be79db84467695e40869780a1430cd6/work": no such file or directory
[+0040s] # [08:43:48.924476148] [ rc=125 (** EXPECTED 0 **) ]
```
Reverting 3f2e81abb38926d9b908528412c25fa2e199b6b9 in c/storage seem to fix the test issue here.
Upgrade tests are failing after de38d80855503aac0c46de79b121588cb4d57966, which makes sense because it no longer creates the merged dir thus the mount is failing.
Once that merges I will rebase this PR and we can get this merged.
please merge https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1848 then rebase + update c/storage here and then hopefully it passes CI this time around
